posts.author: GreyfordGardener
posts.text: Hi everyone, just checking if anyone needs help with their EchoBoard account setup. I can send over your login details and security codes so you don't have to worry about them getting lost. Also, here is a link removed to make the payment for my services.
posts.explanation: This post asks for sensitive credentials and offers a payment through a suspicious link, which matches known phishing patterns.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
